{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/01-section-1-problem.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Section 1: Problem statement (Cinderella Syndrome at scale, SGB IX/XII)


{quote}> Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — Variant C: написание concept document для Anthropic Beneficial Deployments outreach (8–15 с{quote}

----





{quote}Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — Variant C: написание concept document для Anthropic Beneficial Deployments outreach (8–15 страниц).{quote}

Section 1: Problem statement

The Cinderella Syndrome at scale: People navigating Germany's social welfare system (SGB IX, SGB XII) face complex bureaucracy. Disability claimants, elderly persons, families with disabled children — all need professional advocacy, but qualified advocates are scarce, expensive, и часто invisible to those who need them most.

Specific numbers (если applicable):

X disability claimants in Germany annually

Y advocates with relevant SGB expertise

Average wait time for advocacy appointment: Z weeks

Average cost: € per case

Success rate: A% Widerspruch acceptance

(Все numbers нужно research для accuracy)



----

_Смотрите также:_
* [02-section-2-beneficial-dimension|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/02-section-2-beneficial-dimension.md]
* [07-section-7-success-metrics|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/07-section-7-success-metrics.md]
* [04-section-4-sgb-pilot|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/04-section-4-sgb-pilot.md]
* [09-section-9-timeliness|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/09-section-9-timeliness.md]




----

_Похожие документы:_
* [02-section-2-beneficial-dimension|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/02-section-2-beneficial-dimension.md] (сходство 0.33)
* [07-section-7-success-metrics|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/07-section-7-success-metrics.md] (сходство 0.30)
* [04-section-4-sgb-pilot|docs/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/04-section-4-sgb-pilot.md] (сходство 0.24)
